Data Processing Addendum (CN) for Redpine Robotics (Haining) Technology Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Credit Code: Q1A2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9).
This addendum governs HR onboarding, issuer compliance, and IT operations under the PIPL, CSL, and DSL; Redpine acts as a data handler and its affiliates as entrusted processors where applicable.
For issuer obligations with the CSRC and the Shanghai Stock Exchange, Redpine processes only information necessary for already-announced matters and will not disclose inside information prior to public release as defined by Securities Law.
References to trading halts, insider lists, or blackout windows in this document are illustrative only and do not indicate that such datasets are processed in this workflow.
Data subject requests (access/copy/correction/deletion/withdrawal) may be submitted via privacy@redpine.example.cn or https://privacy.redpine.example.cn/dsar, and we respond within 15 working days.
For a limited security access audit, we may process quasi-identifiers in combination: partial date of birth (1990-02), work location (Jiangcheng District), employer (Redpine Robotics (Haining) Technology Co., Ltd.), role (Firmware Intern), device model (Yunrui S13) with device ID 860000000000000, intranet account eID rp-qa-4472, masked resident ID ****5678, and app instance ID app-3f2c9.
Cross-border transfers occur only for incident ticket metadata under the CAC Standard Contract (2022 version), with fields de-identified and stored on servers located in the PRC; overseas support centers receive aggregated counts only.
Retention: access logs 180 days, device telemetry 6 months, payroll-related HR files for 3 years post-termination, and issuer compliance records per bourse rules; early deletion is available where laws permit.
Resident identity card numbers are neither required nor collected for device enrollment; where a legal basis exists (e.g., statutory onboarding), only the last four digits may be retained, and originals are immediately hashed.
We do not knowingly process personal information of minors under 14 years old in HR workflows; if discovered, we will obtain guardian consent or delete such records.
Onboarding forms use generic labels (Name, DOB YYYY-MM, City, Department, Role, Account No.: 0000-XX-0000), and placeholder fields such as Ticker: N/A and Project Code: STAR-000 do not identify an individual.
Access to pre-disclosure board materials is restricted to role-based mailboxes (legal-counsel@redpine.example.cn; compliance-ops@redpine.example.cn), with event-only logs and no message content processing.
Public information such as the equity incentive plan filing dated 2022-12-20 on the exchange website is considered stale and out of MNPI scope for this addendum.
Questions may be addressed to the Data Protection Office; complaints can be lodged with the local CAC or the exchange service center per published channels, and no sale or illegal sharing of personal information is conducted.
